creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
After the update of graphics/vigra from 1.7.1 to 1.8.0 SAGA GIS does not build any more because of minor changes in the VIGRA api.

Fix: The patch enhances FFTWComplex like it is needed for new VIGRA.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Build math/saga.
